verses.text: 'If ye then be risen with Christ, seek those things which are above'; set your affection on things above. Look up. The risen heart is fixed on heaven.
'If ye then be risen with Christ, seek those things which are above'; set your affection on things above. Look up. The risen heart is fixed on heaven.
Ye are dead, 'and your life is hid with Christ in God'; when He appears, ye shall appear in glory. Hidden life. Our true life is safe in Christ, to be revealed in glory.
Ye are dead, 'and your life is hid with Christ in God'; when He appears, ye shall appear in glory. Hidden life. Our true life is safe in Christ, to be revealed in glory.
Mortify your members: fornication, covetousness; for these the wrath of God comes. Put sin to death. The old desires must be slain.
Mortify your members: fornication, covetousness; for these the wrath of God comes. Put sin to death. The old desires must be slain.
Mortify your members: fornication, covetousness; for these the wrath of God comes. Put sin to death. The old desires must be slain.
Put off anger, wrath, malice, lying, having 'put off the old man.' Off with the old. The former life is to be cast aside.
Put off anger, wrath, malice, lying, having 'put off the old man.' Off with the old. The former life is to be cast aside.
Ye have put on the new man; 'Christ is all, and in all.' New self. In Christ all distinctions fall away.
Ye have put on the new man; 'Christ is all, and in all.' New self. In Christ all distinctions fall away.
Put on mercies, kindness, meekness, forgiving one another; 'above all these things put on charity.' Clothed in love. Love binds all the graces together.
Put on mercies, kindness, meekness, forgiving one another; 'above all these things put on charity.' Clothed in love. Love binds all the graces together.
Put on mercies, kindness, meekness, forgiving one another; 'above all these things put on charity.' Clothed in love. Love binds all the graces together.
Let the peace of God rule; 'let the word of Christ dwell in you richly'; do all in His name. Ruled and rich. His peace and word govern the heart.
Let the peace of God rule; 'let the word of Christ dwell in you richly'; do all in His name. Ruled and rich. His peace and word govern the heart.
Let the peace of God rule; 'let the word of Christ dwell in you richly'; do all in His name. Ruled and rich. His peace and word govern the heart.
Wives, submit to your husbands; husbands, love your wives, 'and be not bitter.' Household love. The home is ordered in mutual love.
Wives, submit to your husbands; husbands, love your wives, 'and be not bitter.' Household love. The home is ordered in mutual love.
Children, obey your parents; fathers, provoke not your children. Family order. Each has his loving duty.
Children, obey your parents; fathers, provoke not your children. Family order. Each has his loving duty.
Servants, obey your masters, doing it heartily 'as to the Lord'; ye serve the Lord Christ. Heart service. All work is done as unto Christ.
Servants, obey your masters, doing it heartily 'as to the Lord'; ye serve the Lord Christ. Heart service. All work is done as unto Christ.
